title: viola × rupestriformis
intro: Viola × rupestriformis, also known as the alpine viola or rock viola, is a hybrid species of flowering plant that is a cross between Viola alpina and Viola x intermedia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it useful in treating a range of health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, colds, and respiratory issues, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Herbal preparations of Viola × rupestriformis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve symptoms of various ailments and promote overall well-being.
